stat_descriptions.Speed: Primary driver of sprint and jump performance.
stat_descriptions.Agility: Improves acceleration, direction changes, and hurdle or jump mechanics.
stat_descriptions.Strength: Adds power for starts, throws, and takeoff.
stat_descriptions.Stamina: Sustains pace in longer races and late-race pushes.
stat_descriptions.Toughness: Reduces fatigue effects and keeps form under strain.
stat_descriptions.Mentality: Handles pressure and keeps performance steady in big moments.
stat_descriptions.Technique: Reduces result variance. Critical for hurdles, jumps, and throws.
stat_descriptions.Recovery: Increases weekly energy regeneration. Enables heavier training loads.

Sprints.description: Primary stats: Speed, Agility, Strength. Events: 100m, 200m, 400m. Flavor: Explosive straight-line speed and power.

Hurdler.description: Primary stats: Speed, Agility, Technique. Events: 110mH, 400mH. Flavor: Rhythm and precision over barriers.

Middle Distance.description: Primary stats: Stamina, Mentality, Toughness. Events: 800m, 1600m. Flavor: Balanced engine for tactical races.

Long Distance.description: Primary stats: Stamina, Toughness, Recovery. Events: 1600m, 3200m. Flavor: Relentless endurance and recovery.

Throwing.description: Primary stats: Strength, Technique. Events: Shot Put, Discus, Javelin. Flavor: Power and mechanics to launch big marks.
Throwing.flavor: Power and mechanics to launch big marks.

Jumping.description: Primary stats: Speed, Agility, Technique. Events: Long Jump, High Jump, Triple Jump. Flavor: Elastic speed and timing in the air.
Jumping.flavor: Elastic speed and timing in the air.

4.description: Set at least one PB in your final season.

1.description: Set a PB in any jumping event.

milestones.name: Rival Crusher
milestones.description: Defeat rivals 5 times across your career.

milestones.name: Big Meet Performer
milestones.description: Earn 3 podium finishes at championship meets.

milestones.name: Consistent Professional
milestones.description: Complete 2 seasons without hitting very low energy.

milestones.name: Championship Fixture
milestones.description: Earn 6 podium finishes at championship meets.

milestones.name: Rivalry Legend
milestones.description: Defeat rivals 10 times across your career.

offseason_cards.label: Speed Block
offseason_cards.description: Intensive speed work. Big gains, but you enter the season depleted.

offseason_cards.label: Endurance Block
offseason_cards.description: Deep mileage cycle. Big stamina gains, but you enter the season depleted.

offseason_cards.label: Strength Block
offseason_cards.description: Intensive lifting cycle. Big strength gains, but you enter the season depleted.

offseason_cards.label: Agility Block
offseason_cards.description: Intensive agility drills. Big gains, but you enter the season depleted.

offseason_cards.label: Hurdles Form Work
offseason_cards.description: Dedicated hurdle mechanics and clearance drills. Builds the agility and technique that win in lanes.

offseason_cards.label: Race Speed Work
offseason_cards.description: Sprint and clearance drills at race pace. Sharpens approach speed and footwork.

offseason_cards.label: Recovery Focus
offseason_cards.description: Low volume, intentional rest. Smaller gains but you enter the season at full energy.

offseason_cards.label: Technique Camp
offseason_cards.description: Form work and mental reps. Balanced gains in the soft skills.

offseason_cards.label: Explosiveness Training
offseason_cards.description: Power and burst work. Good for explosive events.

offseason_cards.label: Distance Block
offseason_cards.description: Mileage and aerobic base. Builds deep stamina and recovery.

offseason_cards.label: All-Around Development
offseason_cards.description: Well-rounded training. Small gains across four key areas.
